fault_hypothesis: Line 80 incorrectly slices off the last byte with `data[:-1]`, truncating the result. The return should be `data` (the fully accumulated payload) without any slicing.

spec.expr: len(__cbfl_result) == sum(len(part) for _, part in chunk_list)

constraints.intent: The returned bytes length must equal the total length of all chunk data, not one byte less.

spec.expr: len(data) == sum(len(p) for _, p in chunk_list[:chunk_list.index((_, part)) + 1])

constraints.intent: After each iteration data should accumulate all bytes seen so far without any truncation.
data starts as EMPTY_PAYLOAD (b'') before the loop accumulates chunks.

spec.expr: len(__cbfl_result) == sum(len(part) for _, part in chunks) or not chunks or separator

constraints.intent: Final result must contain all bytes from all chunks when separator is empty.
